features.name: Auto-Classification
features.description: Automatically classify complaints based on type, category, and subject matter

features.name: Severity Scoring
features.description: Assign severity scores based on complaint content and historical patterns

features.name: Duplicate Detection
features.description: Identify and flag potential duplicate complaints from same citizen

features.name: Cluster Analysis
features.description: Group related complaints into clusters for better analysis and tracking

features.name: Sentiment Analysis
features.description: Analyze citizen tone and urgency from complaint text

features.name: Officer Assignment
features.description: Suggest best officers for complaint assignment based on workload and expertise

features.name: Priority Ranking
features.description: Rank complaints by priority for faster resolution

features.name: SLA Prediction
features.description: Predict likelihood of SLA breach for early warning

features.name: Resolution Time Estimator
features.description: Estimate time required to resolve each complaint

features.name: Automated Response Generator
features.description: Generate appropriate acknowledgment responses for citizens
